zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady, Anne Swinborne於大約1323年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親George De Swinburne16歲，母親Grace Swinburne53歲。她於1341年與Ralph Andrews III在英國諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1377年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾基爾比享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady, Anne Swinborne于大约1323年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲George De Swinburne16岁，母亲Grace Swinburne53岁。她于1341年与Ralph Andrews III在英国諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1377年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾基爾比享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swinborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinburn
meanings: English: locative name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumb), but perhaps occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady, Anne Swinborne was born about 1323, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, George De Swinburne, was 16 and her mother, Grace Swinburne, was 53. She married Ralph Andrews III in 1341, in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1377, in Kilby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady, Anne Swinborne est née environ 1323, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George De Swinburne, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Grace Swinburne, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Andrews III en 1341, à Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1377, à Kilby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady, Anne Swinborne um 1323 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George De Swinburne 16 und ihre Mutter Grace Swinburne 53. Sie hat 1341 in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England Ralph Andrews III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1377 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kilby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady, Anne Swinborne è nata il circa 1323 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, George De Swinburne, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Grace Swinburne, aveva 53 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Andrews III nel 1341, nel Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1377, nel Kilby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady, Anne Swinborneが約1323年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父George De Swinburneは16歳，母Grace Swinburneは53歳であった。1341年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアキルスビーでRalph Andrews IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1377年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビーで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady, Anne Swinborne(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George De Swinburne(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Swinburne(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 1341년 영국 노르섬프토실르 킬스비에서 Ralph Andrews III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 킬비에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady, Anne Swinborne nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, George De Swinburne, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Grace Swinburne, tinha 53 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Andrews III em 1341, em Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1377, em Kilby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady, Anne Swinborne родилась около 1323 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени George De Swinburne было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Swinburne, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Andrews III в 1341 г. в местности килсби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1377 г. в местности килби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady, Anne Swinborne nació aproximadamente 1323, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George De Swinburne, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Grace Swinburne, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Ralph Andrews III en 1341, en Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1377, en Kilby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
